Subject: // ACC MOHAR SHIPPING CORP / 50K-57K DWT / TCT WITH CLINKER IN BULK EX INDO TO SRILANKA // 
 
DATE : 14TH NOVEMBER, 2025​
REF  : IBC/KG/025
 
WE HAVE FOLLOWING TO FIX:​​​
 
-A/C MOHAR SHIPPING CORP PTE LTD
-50K-57K
-4X30MT MAX 190M
-DELIVERY: ECI- SPORE_SEASIA RANGE
-LOAD PORT: TUBAN INDONESIA
-CLINKER IN BULK
-REDELIVERY: SRI LANKA TRINCOMALEE
-LAYCAN: 29TH NOV-4TH DEC
-DUR: ABT 20-25 DAYS WOG
-3.75% ADDCOM PLUS 1.25% TO INTERBULK​
